recommendations.title: Curse of the Blair Witch
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary exploring the life of the Blair Witch and the three missing student filmmakers.

recommendations.title: Solstice
recommendations.overview: While on a summer trip with her friends, Megan begins to feel the presence of Sophie, her twin sister who recently committed suicide.

recommendations.title: The Blair Witch Project
recommendations.overview: In October of 1994 three student filmmakers disappeared in the woods near Burkittsville, Maryland, while shooting a documentary. A year later their footage was found.

recommendations.title: Spectral
recommendations.overview: A special-ops team is dispatched to fight supernatural beings that have taken over a European city.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Tomb
recommendations.overview: Captain Mack leads an elite military unit on a search for a missing scientist, and comes face-to-face with an an ancient evil lying beneath the Middle Eastern desert. Evil that is not of this world. Evil that should never be unearthed.

recommendations.title: Avatar
recommendations.overview: In the 22nd century, a paraplegic Marine is dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission, but becomes torn between following orders and protecting an alien civilization.

recommendations.title: Outpost: Black Sun
recommendations.overview: A pair of investigators team up with a Special Forces Unit to venture deep inside a war raging between the military and a massive army of Nazi Zombie Stormtroopers. Their mission is to fight their way behind enemy lines, locate the technology at the

recommendations.title: 12 Strong
recommendations.overview: A team of special forces head into Afghanistan in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks in an attempt to dismantle the Taliban.

recommendations.title: Eternals
recommendations.overview: The Eternals are a team of ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. When an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows, they are forced to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.

recommendations.title: Land of Bad
